# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/david/coopsdevfield/OpenHobbyOS/build/ports/fastfetch
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//How to link fastfetch
BINARY_LINK_TYPE:STRING=static

//Build flashfetch
BUILD_FLASHFETCH:BOOL=OFF

//Build tests
BUILD_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/addr2line

//Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo
// MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=Release

//Enable/Disable color output during build.
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE:BOOL=ON

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=CMAKE_C_COMPILER_AR-NOTFOUND

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=CMAKE_C_COMPILER_RANLIB-NOTFOUND

//Flags used by the C compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS:STRING=-O2 -D_GNU_SOURCE -D_DEFAULT_SOURCE -D_POSIX_C_SOURCE=200809L -D_POSIX_TIMERS=200809L -D_POSIX_MONOTONIC_CLOCK=200809L -D_POSIX_CLOCK_SELECTION=200809L -Dgetline=__getline -Dgetdelim=__getdelim

//Flags used by the C compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the C compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG -Wno-char-subscripts

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_DLLTOOL:FILEPATH=CMAKE_DLLTOOL-NOTFOUND

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_DL_LIBS:UNINITIALIZED=

//Flags used by the linker during all build types.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=--sysroot=/home/david/coopsdevfield/OpenHobbyOS/build/ports/sysroot -static -Wl,-T,/home/david/coopsdevfield/OpenHobbyOS/user.ld -nostartfiles -lopenhobbyosgloss

//Flags used by the linker during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Enable/Disable output of compile commands during generation.
CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS:BOOL=

//Value Computed by CMake.
CMAKE_FIND_PACKAGE_REDIRECTS_DIR:STATIC=/home/david/coopsdevfield/OpenHobbyOS/build/ports/fastfetch/CMakeFiles/pkgRedirects

//User executables (bin)
CMAKE_INSTALL_BINDIR:PATH=bin

//Read-only architecture-independent data (DATAROOTDIR)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DATADIR:PATH=

//Read-only architecture-independent data root (share)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DATAROOTDIR:PATH=share

//Documentation root (DATAROOTDIR/doc/PROJECT_NAME)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DOCDIR:PATH=

//C header files (include)
CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR:PATH=include

//Info documentation (DATAROOTDIR/info)
CMAKE_INSTALL_INFODIR:PATH=

//Object code libraries (lib)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR:PATH=lib

//Program executables (libexec)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBEXECDIR:PATH=libexec

//Locale-dependent data (DATAROOTDIR/locale)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LOCALEDIR:PATH=

//Modifiable single-machine data (var)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LOCALSTATEDIR:PATH=var

//Man documentation (DATAROOTDIR/man)
CMAKE_INSTALL_MANDIR:PATH=

//C header files for non-gcc (/usr/include)
CMAKE_INSTALL_OLDINCLUDEDIR:PATH=/usr/include

//Install path prefix, prepended onto install directories.
CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:PATH=/

//Run-time variable data (LOCALSTATEDIR/run)
CMAKE_INSTALL_RUNSTATEDIR:PATH=

//System admin executables (sbin)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SBINDIR:PATH=sbin

//Modifiable architecture-independent data (com)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SHAREDSTATEDIR:PATH=com

//...
CMAKE_INSTALL_SYSCONFDIR:PATH=/etc

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_LINKER:FILEPATH=/home/david/coopsdevfield/OpenHobbyOS/toolchain/bin/i686-openhobbyos-ld

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gmake

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during
// all build types.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during
// DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during
// MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during
// RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during
// RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_NM:FILEPATH=/home/david/coopsdevfield/OpenHobbyOS/toolchain/bin/i686-openhobbyos-nm

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_OBJCOPY:FILEPATH=/home/david/coopsdevfield/OpenHobbyOS/toolchain/bin/i686-openhobbyos-objcopy

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_OBJDUMP:FILEPATH=/home/david/coopsdevfield/OpenHobbyOS/toolchain/bin/i686-openhobbyos-objdump

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_DESCRIPTION:STATIC=Fast neofetch-like system information tool

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_HOMEPAGE_URL:STATIC=https://github.com/fastfetch-cli/fastfetch

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME:STATIC=fastfetch

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_VERSION:STATIC=2.61.0

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_VERSION_MAJOR:STATIC=2

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_VERSION_MINOR:STATIC=61

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_VERSION_PATCH:STATIC=0

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_VERSION_TWEAK:STATIC=

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_READELF:FILEPATH=/home/david/coopsdevfield/OpenHobbyOS/toolchain/bin/i686-openhobbyos-readelf

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during all build types.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//If set, runtime paths are not added when installing shared libraries,
// but are added when building.
CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RPATH:BOOL=NO

//If set, runtime paths are not added when using shared libraries.
CMAKE_SKIP_RPATH:BOOL=NO

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during all build types.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_TAPI:FILEPATH=CMAKE_TAPI-NOTFOUND

//The CMake toolchain file
CMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE:FILEPATH=/home/david/coopsdevfield/OpenHobbyOS/ports/fastfetch/openhobbyos-toolchain.cmake

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console
// during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual
// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

//Enable to build RPM source packages
CPACK_SOURCE_RPM:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to build TBZ2 source packages
CPACK_SOURCE_TBZ2:BOOL=ON

//Enable to build TGZ source packages
CPACK_SOURCE_TGZ:BOOL=ON

//Enable to build TXZ source packages
CPACK_SOURCE_TXZ:BOOL=ON

//Enable to build TZ source packages
CPACK_SOURCE_TZ:BOOL=ON

//Enable to build ZIP source packages
CPACK_SOURCE_ZIP:BOOL=OFF

//Custom path to file amdgpu.ids, defaults to `/usr/share/libdrm/amdgpu.ids`
CUSTOM_AMDGPU_IDS_PATH:STRING=

//Custom path to file os-release, defaults to `/etc/os-release`
CUSTOM_OS_RELEASE_PATH:STRING=

//Custom path to file pci.ids, defaults to `/usr/share/hwdata/pci.ids`
CUSTOM_PCI_IDS_PATH:STRING=

//Build fastfetch with ASAN (address sanitizer)
ENABLE_ASAN:BOOL=OFF

//Enable dbus-1
ENABLE_DBUS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable dconf
ENABLE_DCONF:BOOL=OFF

//Enable ddcutil
ENABLE_DDCUTIL:BOOL=OFF

//Enable libdrm
ENABLE_DRM:BOOL=OFF

//Enable libdrm_amdgpu
ENABLE_DRM_AMDGPU:BOOL=OFF

//Enable egl
ENABLE_EGL:BOOL=OFF

//Enable libelf
ENABLE_ELF:BOOL=OFF

//Embed amdgpu.ids into fastfetch, requires `python`
ENABLE_EMBEDDED_AMDGPUIDS:BOOL=OFF

//Embed pci.ids into fastfetch, requires `python`
ENABLE_EMBEDDED_PCIIDS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable gio-2.0
ENABLE_GIO:BOOL=OFF

//Enable glx
ENABLE_GLX:BOOL=OFF

//Enable imagemagick 6
ENABLE_IMAGEMAGICK6:BOOL=OFF

//Enable imagemagick 7
ENABLE_IMAGEMAGICK7:BOOL=OFF

//Enable libzfs
ENABLE_LIBZFS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable link-time optimization in release mode if supported
ENABLE_LTO:BOOL=ON

//Enable opencl
ENABLE_OPENCL:BOOL=OFF

//Enable pulse
ENABLE_PULSE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable rpm
ENABLE_RPM:BOOL=OFF

//Enable sqlite3
ENABLE_SQLITE3:BOOL=OFF

//Use system provided (instead of fastfetch embedded) yyjson library
ENABLE_SYSTEM_YYJSON:BOOL=OFF

//Enable multithreading
ENABLE_THREADS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable vulkan
ENABLE_VULKAN:BOOL=OFF

//Enable wayland-client
ENABLE_WAYLAND:BOOL=OFF

//Enable using of wordexp(3) if available, instead of glob(3)
ENABLE_WORDEXP:BOOL=OFF

//Enable xcb-randr
ENABLE_XCB_RANDR:BOOL=OFF

//Enable xrandr
ENABLE_XRANDR:BOOL=OFF

//Enable zlib
ENABLE_ZLIB:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a program.
HAVE_DPKG:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/dpkg

//Path to a program.
HAVE_RPMBUILD:FILEPATH=HAVE_RPMBUILD-NOTFOUND

//Install license into /usr/share/licenses
INSTALL_LICENSE:BOOL=ON

//Build with musl libc
IS_MUSL:BOOL=OFF

//...
LINUX:BOOL=TRUE

//OpenHobbyOS sysroot
OPENHOBBYOS_SYSROOT:PATH=/home/david/coopsdevfield/OpenHobbyOS/build/ports/sysroot

//OpenHobbyOS cross target
OPENHOBBYOS_TARGET:STRING=i686-openhobbyos

//OpenHobbyOS user linker script
OPENHOBBYOS_USER_LD:FILEPATH=/home/david/coopsdevfield/OpenHobbyOS/user.ld

//Disable AM package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_AM:BOOL=OFF

//Disable APK package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_APK:BOOL=OFF

//Disable BREW package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_BREW:BOOL=OFF

//Disable CHOCO package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_CHOCO:BOOL=OFF

//Disable DPKG package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_DPKG:BOOL=OFF

//Disable EMERGE package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_EMERGE:BOOL=OFF

//Disable EOPKG package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_EOPKG:BOOL=OFF

//Disable FLATPAK package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_FLATPAK:BOOL=OFF

//Disable GUIX package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_GUIX:BOOL=OFF

//Disable LINGLONG package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_LINGLONG:BOOL=OFF

//Disable LPKG package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_LPKG:BOOL=OFF

//Disable LPKGBUILD package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_LPKGBUILD:BOOL=OFF

//Disable MACPORTS package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_MACPORTS:BOOL=OFF

//Disable NIX package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_NIX:BOOL=OFF

//Disable OPKG package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_OPKG:BOOL=OFF

//Disable PACMAN package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_PACMAN:BOOL=OFF

//Disable PACSTALL package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_PACSTALL:BOOL=OFF

//Disable PALUDIS package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_PALUDIS:BOOL=OFF

//Disable PISI package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_PISI:BOOL=OFF

//Disable PKG package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_PKG:BOOL=OFF

//Disable PKGTOOL package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_PKGTOOL:BOOL=OFF

//Disable RPM package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_RPM:BOOL=OFF

//Disable SCOOP package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_SCOOP:BOOL=OFF

//Disable SNAP package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_SNAP:BOOL=OFF

//Disable SOAR package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_SOAR:BOOL=OFF

//Disable SORCERY package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_SORCERY:BOOL=OFF

//Disable WINGET package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_WINGET:BOOL=ON

//Disable XBPS package manager detection by default
PACKAGES_DISABLE_XBPS:BOOL=OFF

//Arguments to supply to pkg-config
PKG_CONFIG_ARGN:STRING=

//Add tweak to project version
SET_TWEAK:BOOL=ON

fastfetch_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/david/coopsdevfield/OpenHobbyOS/build/ports/fastfetch

fastfetch_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=ON

ENABLE_CHAFA:INTERNAL=OFF
//Details about finding PkgConfig
FIND_PACKAGE_MESSAGE_DETAILS_PkgConfig:INTERNAL=[i686-openhobbyos-pkg-config][v1.8.1()]
//Details about finding Python
FIND_PACKAGE_MESSAGE_DETAILS_Python:INTERNAL=[/usr/bin/python3][cfound components: Interpreter ][v3.12.3()]
//Details about finding Threads
FIND_PACKAGE_MESSAGE_DETAILS_Threads:INTERNAL=[TRUE][v()]
//Have include linux/videodev2.h
HAVE_LINUX_VIDEODEV2:INTERNAL=1
//Have include linux/wireless.h
HAVE_LINUX_WIRELESS:INTERNAL=1
//Have function malloc_usable_size
HAVE_MALLOC_USABLE_SIZE:INTERNAL=1
//Have function memrchr
HAVE_MEMRCHR:INTERNAL=1
//Have function pipe2
HAVE_PIPE2:INTERNAL=1
//Have include utmpx.h
HAVE_UTMPX:INTERNAL=
//Have function wcwidth
HAVE_WCWIDTH:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: PKG_CONFIG_ARGN
PKG_CONFIG_ARGN-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//linker supports push/pop state
_CMAKE_LINKER_PUSHPOP_STATE_SUPPORTED:INTERNAL=TRUE
//CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX during last run
_GNUInstallDirs_LAST_CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:INTERNAL=/
//Compiler reason failure
_Python_Compiler_REASON_FAILURE:INTERNAL=
//Development reason failure
_Python_Development_REASON_FAILURE:INTERNAL=
//Path to a program.
_Python_EXECUTABLE:INTERNAL=/usr/bin/python3
//Python Properties
_Python_INTERPRETER_PROPERTIES:INTERNAL=Python;3;12;3;32;64;;;abi3;/usr/lib/python3.12;/usr/lib/python3.12;/usr/local/lib/python3.12/dist-packages;/usr/local/lib/python3.12/dist-packages
_Python_INTERPRETER_SIGNATURE:INTERNAL=4c8bfa8951e99fa32e4000a94f8c04a2
//NumPy reason failure
_Python_NumPy_REASON_FAILURE:INTERNAL=
